basics.name: appName
basics.label: Application Name
basics.toolTip: A unique name for your VariScout deployment (3-24 lowercase letters, numbers, or hyphens).

constraints.validationMessage: Name must be 3-24 lowercase letters, numbers, or hyphens.

options.text: VariScout uses Azure AD for authentication. You must create an App Registration before deploying. Go to Azure Portal > Azure Active Directory > App registrations > New registration. Set the redirect URI to: https://<your-app-name>.azurewebsites.net/.auth/login/aad/callback (Web platform). Under API permissions, add Microsoft Graph delegated permissions: User.Read and Files.ReadWrite. Under Certificates & secrets, create a new client secret and copy the value below.

elements.name: clientId
elements.label: App Registration Client ID
elements.toolTip: The Application (client) ID from your App Registration. Found on the Overview page of the App Registration.

elements.name: clientSecret
elements.toolTip: A client secret from your App Registration. Found under Certificates & secrets.
